# tfe_project

This data source can be used to retrieve a project in an organization.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the project.

### Optional

- `organization` (String) The name of the organization that the project belongs to.

### Read-Only

- `auto_destroy_activity_duration` (String) The duration after which the project will be auto-destroyed.
- `description` (String) The description of the project.
- `effective_tags` (Map of String) A map of key-value tags associated with the project.
- `id` (String) The system-generated ID of the project.
- `workspace_ids` (Set of String) The IDs of the workspaces associated with the project.
- `workspace_names` (Set of String) The names of the workspaces associated with the project.
